allow: Bash(psql -U coretriage -d coretriage_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM sessions;")

Bash(python -c "from src.triage import bucket_possibilities, red_flags, Intake; mk = lambda **k: Intake\(region=k.get\('region','Calf'\), onset=k.get\('onset','Sudden'\), pain_type='Sharp', severity=k.get\('severity',7\), swelling=k.get\('swelling','No'\), bruising=k.get\('bruising','No'\), numbness=k.get\('numbness','No'\), weakness='None', instability='No', mechanism=k.get\('mechanism','Heel hook'\), free_text=k.get\('text',''\)\); print\('--- Calf \(tennis leg trigger\) ---'\); [print\(' ',n\) for n,_ in bucket_possibilities\(mk\(region='Calf', mechanism='Heel hook', text='I felt a pop'\)\)]; print\('--- Upper Back ---'\); [print\(' ',n\) for n,_ in bucket_possibilities\(mk\(region='Upper Back', mechanism='Steep climbing/board', text='hurts when I take a deep breath'\)\)]; print\('--- Red: compartment ---'\); [print\(' ',f\) for f in red_flags\(mk\(region='Calf', severity=9, numbness='Yes', text='feels rock hard'\)\)]; print\('--- Red: locked knee ---'\); [print\(' ',f\) for f in red_flags\(mk\(region='Knee', severity=6, text='knee is locked'\)\)]; print\('--- Red: hamstring avulsion ---'\); [print\(' ',f\) for f in red_flags\(mk\(region='Hamstring', onset='Sudden', severity=9, bruising='Yes', text='heard a pop'\)\)]; print\('--- Red: chest ---'\); [print\(' ',f\) for f in red_flags\(mk\(region='Chest', severity=9, text='hard to breathe'\)\)]")
